title: Feeling Peachy
description: A modpack used by FloatingMegane's private server
body:
# Welcome to Feeling Peachy! 

This modpack is made for the sole purpose of Floating Megane and their friends. 

- 🍑 It contains cool farming mods that let you **grow special plants and raise unique animals**. 
- 🍳 You can cook lots of yummy foods and discover new recipes. 
- ✨ There are also fun decoration mods to **make your builds look amazing**. 

# Mod Copyright Attributions:
All mods hosted outside of Modrinth are linked below to the original source.
Each mod has been checked to assure they can be used in this pack with credit respective to each owner.
- **Aquaculture 2**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- **Aquaculture Delight**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture-delight)
- **Framework Library** _(used for MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod)_: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)
- **Pam's HarvestCraft 2 - Crops**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops)
- **Pam's HarvestCraft 2 - Trees**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-trees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-trees)
- **MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished**: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
- Cosmetic Armor Reworked: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
